meaning: n.假货,欺骗adj.假的vt.伪造,赝造,捏造,假造,仿造vi.伪装
examples: No one spotted that the gun was a fake.
A sharp-eyed shop clerk spotted the fake.
He tried to fake sincerity as he smiled at them.
Many are pretty tacky: full of plastic flowers, fake stained-glass windows and doll's-house pews.
There were a few offers for fake boyfriends, but it is overwhelmingly women who offer the service.
